## New Officer Compliance Onboarding Checklist
## 新职员履新合规审查清单

**Officer Name / 职员姓名:**
**Role / 职位:**
**Start Date / 就任日期:**
**Assigned Secretary / 负责秘书:**

---

### Section 1 — Eligibility Verification (Section 47, ISA 2022)
### 第1部分 — 资格核查（ISA 2022 第47条）

- [ ] Officer Eligibility Declaration Form signed and filed with Secretary
- [ ] Age confirmed ≥ 18 years
- [ ] Confirmed financial member of HCCA
- [ ] Confirmed NOT an undischarged bankrupt
- [ ] Confirmed NOT prohibited from being an officer under ISA 2022 or any enactment
- [ ] Confirmed NO conviction for dishonesty offence in past 5 years
- [ ] Confirmed NOT subject to a property order under PPPR Act 1988
- [ ] Written consent to act as officer obtained and filed

### Section 2 — Policy Briefing
### 第2部分 — 政策简介

- [ ] Copy of HCCA Constitution provided and read
- [ ] Conflict of Interest Policy briefed and acknowledged
- [ ] Financial Control Policy briefed and acknowledged
- [ ] Overseas Funding Rules briefed and acknowledged (if Treasurer)
- [ ] Dispute Resolution Policy briefed and acknowledged
- [ ] Code of Conduct acknowledged
- [ ] Governance Git Flow / GOVERNANCE.md briefed

### Section 3 — Interests Register
### 第3部分 — 利益登记册

- [ ] Officer has reviewed the Interests Register
- [ ] Standing interests declared in Part A of Interests Register (or NIL declared)
- [ ] Secretary has recorded the declaration in the Interests Register

### Section 4 — Access & Systems
### 第4部分 — 权限与系统

- [ ] Read access to this GitHub repository granted
- [ ] HCCA email account created (if applicable)
- [ ] Bank account signatory added (if Treasurer/President — requires bank form)
- [ ] Added to Committee communication channel (WhatsApp/Signal/email group)
- [ ] Access to accounting software granted (if Treasurer)

### Section 5 — Contact Person (if applicable)
### 第5部分 — 联络人（如适用）

- [ ] Is this officer designated as Contact Person? ☐ Yes ☐ No
- [ ] If Yes: Contact Person Consent Form signed and filed
- [ ] If Yes: Registrar notified within 20 working days

### Section 6 — Registrar Notification
### 第6部分 — 通知注册处

- [ ] Change of officer notified to Registrar of Incorporated Societies within **20 working days** of appointment
- [ ] Charities Services updated (if required)

---

**Onboarding completed by (Secretary):** ______________________
**Date completed:** ______________________

*Reference: [Committee Eligibility Policy](../../governance_&_officers/committee_eligibility.md)*
